assertions.assertion: Configures AddJwtBearer with an Authority and Audience for the DCR scheme
assertions.rationale: Code shows AddJwtBearer('Bearer', options => { options.Authority = '...'; ValidAudience = '...' })

assertions.assertion: Creates an authorization policy that requires an authenticated user and a specific scope claim
Applies RequireAuthorization with the named policy to MapDynamicClientRegistration()
Uses AddAuthentication() and AddAuthorization() with proper policy configuration
assertions.rationale: Both AddAuthentication and AddAuthorization are properly configured

assertions.assertion: Does NOT expose MapDynamicClientRegistration() without authorization
